name: Whitelist
shortDescription: Create on-chain access lists to control entry, privileges, and participation across your guild.
longDescription: The Whitelist module allows you to forge on-chain lists of approved wallets. These lists can be applied globally across your entire dGuild, at individual module level, or even at transaction level.
detailedDescription: Each whitelist is deployed on-chain and can serve multiple purposes: restrict access to your full dGuild environment, gate specific modules (Marketplace, Raffle, etc.), apply conditions at transaction level, power Discord role conditions, and manage airdrops or token distributions. Whitelists are flexible and composable across modules. Pricing: 50 USDC per list (one-time fee) and 0.0044 SOL per slot (reclaimable), making this a capital-efficient gating mechanism.
keyInfo: - Usable at global, module, or transaction level

activationInstructions.intro: Decide who may enter your halls. Forge your access scroll and seal it on-chain.
steps: Choose where the whitelist applies (global, module, transaction)
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per list when you create one.
